title: galium ciliatum var. normale
intro: Galium ciliatum var. normale, also known as the ciliate bedstraw, is a variety of flowering plant in the bedstraw family (Rubiaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Galium ciliatum var. normale include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
